name: Toy Kitchen - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Wood Construction, Creative Play, 3+ Years, No Batteries Required
description:
Help them become culinary greats with this Wooden Toy Kitchen from Hearth & Hand with Magnolia. This fun kitchen toy set features a stovetop complete with burners and a sink, while an oven drawer beneath and a microwave lets your youngsters cook up whatever creations they can imagine. It comes fitted with plenty of knobs, handles and buttons for interactive play, and it sports clean lines and a sleek profile that will blend well with other decor in your home. It’s made from wood for an authentic look and long-lasting use. Whether you place it in their bedroom or in the living room, this wood toy kitchen is sure to make for hours and hours of fun.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
